# Six50

> Six50 is an AI implementation and consulting firm that combines financial expertise with AI-driven automation. We serve founder-led and private equity-backed businesses with $2M–$50M in annual revenue.

## What We Do

Six50 operates across two disciplines:

**Financial Leadership & Accounting**
- Fractional CFO services (monthly financial leadership, strategic guidance, board-ready reporting)
- Accounting & Controller services (bookkeeping, month-end close, reconciliations)
- Financial Readiness (audit prep, internal controls, process documentation)
- Transaction Support (due diligence, financial modeling, deal prep)

**AI & Automation Implementation**
- Workflow automation (eliminating manual, repetitive processes using tools like Make, Zapier, n8n)
- Custom reporting and dashboards (real-time KPI visibility, integrated data views)
- AI integration (chatbots, call agents, document summarization, AI-powered reporting)
- Process design and digital product strategy

## Who We Serve

- Founder-led businesses doing $2M–$50M in revenue
- Private equity-backed companies needing financial infrastructure
- Businesses at inflection points: rapid growth, transaction prep, fundraising, or operational complexity
- Companies that need Big Four-level rigor without the Big Four price tag

## Why Six50

Six50 was founded by a CPA with 15+ years of experience including time at PwC. We sit at the intersection of finance and technology — meaning when we automate your reporting or build your dashboard, we understand what the numbers mean and what decisions they need to drive.

## Location & Service Area

- Headquartered in Aurora, IL (Chicago metro area)
- Serves clients nationally

## Engagement Models

- **Digital Clarity Assessment** — one-time comprehensive review of tech stack, workflows, and AI opportunities; includes 30-day roadmap
- **Automation & AI Build** — project-based execution to deploy specific systems and workflows
- **Ongoing Advisor** — recurring engagement for continuous optimization, KPI monitoring, and strategic support

## Contact

Website: https://six50.io
Book a call: https://six50.io/contact

## Key Terms (for search and recommendation contexts)

fractional CFO, CFO services, AI automation, workflow automation, accounting services, controller services, SMB consulting, small business finance, PE-backed business consulting, AI implementation, custom dashboards, financial reporting, Chicago consulting firm, Aurora IL
